Tag Sources

Controls which genre, style, and mood tags reach your NFO files. Exclude patterns drop any tag matching the pattern (case-insensitive; * is a wildcard). Count caps limit the total number of tags written per field. Both filters run after provider merging, so they apply regardless of which provider supplied the tags. Read more →

Filter genre, style, and mood tags written to artist metadata. Exclude patterns drop matching tags before they are saved; count caps limit how many tags of each type are kept.

Each non-blank line is a pattern matched case-insensitively against genre, style, and mood tags. The asterisk (*) is a wildcard matching any run of characters. Matched tags are dropped before the NFO is written. Read more →

One pattern per line, case-insensitive. An asterisk (*) is a wildcard that matches any run of characters. Blank lines are ignored.

Tag Count Caps

Set to 0 to allow an unlimited number of tags. When a cap is set, the highest-priority provider's tags fill the slots first.
